channel.title: GitHub Models on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Models on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Models is being fully retired on July 30, 2026
item.description:
GitHub Models will be fully retired on July 30, 2026. GitHub had already announced in June that it was closing the service to new customers.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Models is no longer available to new customers
item.description:
GitHub is retiring GitHub Models. As an initial step, new customers can no longer use it, while existing organizations or enterprises that have already used it are not affected by this announcement.

  • Source: GitHub
